objective: Build DRACO — Cross-Domain Benchmark for Deep Research (ADR-037) as the quality gate for the vertical:research harness, with a re-runnable PROOF score

M2.name: OpenRouter fusion client + OPENROUTER_API_KEY wired into GCP-secret gate

constraints: No live API calls without OPENROUTER_API_KEY in env
Client must record {stage, model, promptTokens, completionTokens, wallMs} per call
Must be mockable for M3 deterministic scorer tests
Stage names: decompose | search | grade | synthesize | verify | cite

M3.name: Deterministic scorer + --no-judge runner + first baseline
M3.notes: Grounding (URL re-fetch), Coverage (regex+embedding), Balance, Efficiency. --no-judge skips Faithfulness. Writes packages/bench/draco/runs/<iso>.json.

M4.name: LLM-judge dimension + full proof JSON
M4.notes: Judge model pinned per corpus version. Prompt pinned. Faithfulness dimension (0-1). Full proof JSON shape defined in ADR-037 §4.

M5.name: harness draco subcommand + bench-baseline regression gate + CI job + README score row

M6.name: Fusion-vs-single-model ablation — the proof
M6.notes: Run same corpus with single-model end-to-end vs fusion harness. Prove different-verifier-model design wins on grounding + faithfulness.

lastSession.accomplished: M1 fully delivered and pushed (commit 941b0b9 on main). 20 questions, 5 domains, 15 tests all pass, bench:draco stub wired.
lastSession.nextAction: M2 — read scripts/validate-gcp-secrets.mjs first, then build packages/bench/draco/fusion-client.ts with model-per-stage routing and provenance recording.
